opening_goal: Show that robustness-aware pruning preserves continuity while reducing context more safely than simpler approaches.

scenario.title: Mixed-recall: constraints plus identity
scenario.query: What are the main constraints and what system is being built?

presenter_setup: Keep investor deck available for follow-up: portable-memory-investor-deck-run-20260324T214221Z-429eb2dd.pptx
Keep the demo script markdown open in a side pane or second monitor.
Be ready to zoom in on the comparison previews for compression, hybrid, and robustness-aware pruning.

demo_sequence.say: We help AI systems keep continuity without dragging around bloated context.
The core problem is that most systems either keep too much context or lose important meaning. Our approach rescues the needed context, then prunes only when meaning remains robust.
demo_sequence.goal: Explain the problem and solution in plain language.

demo_sequence.screen_action: Show the selected benchmark scenario title and query
demo_sequence.say: We will use this benchmark scenario: Mixed-recall: constraints plus identity. The question is: What are the main constraints and what system is being built?
demo_sequence.goal: Ground the demo in one concrete case.

demo_sequence.say: Compression mode gets retrieval hit rate 0.6667 and context reduction -15.12. It compresses, but it risks losing critical context structure.
Hybrid mode rescues important meaning, but context reduction is -15.12, which means it still carries too much baggage.
Robustness-aware pruning keeps retrieval hit rate 0.6667 and soft hit rate 0.6667 while improving context reduction to 59.42.

demo_sequence.screen_action: Show customer deck core metrics slide
demo_sequence.say: This is the important point: we are not just compressing. We are preserving the minimum robust meaning needed for continuity.
demo_sequence.goal: Turn the example into the product claim.

demo_sequence.say: This fits enterprise copilots, long-session assistants, support workflows, and memory middleware for AI products.
demo_sequence.goal: Connect the demo to buyer use cases.

demo_sequence.say: This policy also held up under adversarial validation, which matters because real users paraphrase and vary wording.
The next step with a customer is simple: run this against their own traces and measure cost savings and continuity quality.
demo_sequence.goal: Create a direct call to action.

robustness_aware_pruning_mode.preview: Fact: product.core_definition = We want a portable memory package for AI chats. The real product is a mergeable memory container. Be direct and grounded.

objection_handling.response: Because harder summarization often loses the exact constraints and identity details that matter next. This policy is designed to preserve robust meaning, not just shorten text.

objection_handling.objection: Why is this better than retrieval alone?
objection_handling.response: Retrieval can bring back too much or the wrong thing. This controller rescues useful context and then prunes safely under robustness constraints.

objection_handling.objection: How do you know it is reliable?
objection_handling.response: It was benchmarked across exact, soft, and adversarial checks, and robustness-aware pruning was unbeaten across the current scenario set.
Lower context cost, stronger continuity, fewer dropped details, and a more trustworthy memory layer for assistants and copilots.

tone: Keep the explanation concrete and operational.
Do not over-explain algorithms before the win is visible.
Emphasize lower cost plus better continuity together.
timing: 30 seconds for use cases and call to action.
must_say_lines: This is minimum robust meaning for continuity.
We are not just summarizing; we are preserving what matters under variation.
The result is lower context cost without sacrificing continuity quality.
